structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling Demand Limit Setpoint Adjustment
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When a demand limit is imposed on the Zone Group, active cooling setpoints are increased by 0.5°C (1°F) at Level 1, 1°C (2°F) at Level 2, and 2°C (4°F) at Level 3. Changes are not cumulative.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Demand limit level imposed on Zone Group.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Increase active cooling setpoint by specified offset per demand limit level.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: At demand -limit Level 1, increase setpoint by 0.5°C (1°F). At demand -limit Level 2, increase setpoint by 1°C (2°F). At demand -limit Level 3, increase setpoint by 2°C (4°F).

evidence_quote: These levels are used at the zone level (see Sections 5.3.2.6  and 5.3.2.7 ) to shed demand.

structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Decrease active heating setpoint by specified offset per demand limit level.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Occupancy Sensor Setback/Setup
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When unpopulated for 5 minutes during Occupied Mode, decrease heating setpoint by 0.5°C (1°F) and increase cooling setpoint by 0.5°C (1°F). Restore when populated for 1 minute.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Occupancy sensor indicates unpopulated for 5 minutes continuously during Occupied Mode.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Decrease heating setpoint by 0.5°C (1°F), increase cooling setpoint by 0.5°C (1°F); restore after 1 minute of occupancy.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: When the switch indicates that the space has been unpopulated for 5 minutes continuously during the Occupied Mode , the active heating setpoint shall be decreased by 0.5°C (1°F) and the cooling setpoint shall be increased by 0.5°C (1°F). When the switch indicates that the space has been populated for 1 minute continuously, the active heating and cooling setpoint s shall be restored to their previous values.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Zone State Determination
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Zone state is Heating when Heating Loop output > 0 and Cooling Loop output = 0; Cooling when Cooling Loop output > 0 and Heating Loop output = 0; Deadband otherwise.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Set zone state based on loop outputs.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Heating . When the output of the space Heating Loop is nonzero and the output of the Cooling Loop is equal to zero. Cooling . When the output of the space Cooling Loop is nonzero and the output of the Heating Loop is equal to zero. Deadband . When not in either heating or cooling .

structured_payload_candidate.title: High Zone Temperature Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Generate Level 4 alarm if zone temperature is 2°C (3°F) above cooling setpoint for 10 minutes; Level 3 alarm if 3°C (5°F) above cooling setpoint for 10 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone temperature exceeds cooling setpoint by threshold for 10 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Generate Level 4 alarm at 2°C (3°F) above; Level 3 at 3°C (5°F) above.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Zone temperature above cooling setpoint by threshold for 10 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the zone is 2°C (3°F) above cooling setpoint for 10 minutes, generate a Level 4 alarm. If the zone is 3°C (5°F) above cooling setpoint for 10 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.
